description_long: This house features a two-story structure with a flat roof and a prominent front facade adorned with large, arched windows outlined in red. The main entrance is centrally located, marked by a set of double doors and a small overhang, leading into a spacious interior with visible dining and lounge areas. The front and side walls are predominantly white, with red window frames and accents providing a striking contrast. The rear and side extensions suggest additional rooms or utility spaces, with fewer windows and a more utilitarian appearance. Inside, the house is furnished with tables, chairs, and shelving, indicating a well-appointed residential environment. The overall design blends modern and classical elements, with symmetrical window arrangements and clean, geometric lines.
description: A two-story white house with large red-arched windows, a central entryway, and a flat roof, featuring both modern and classical design elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large arched windows, and interior furnishings visible through the open facade.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the plain white walls, minimal windows, and the extension at the rear of the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back extension, a large red door, and limited window openings, emphasizing utility spaces.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the upper interior, staircase, and additional windows, as well as the rear extension.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows of large arched windows on the front facade
attribute_entryway_design: Central double doors with a small overhang, flanked by large arched windows and minimal decorative elements
